channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tinseltown Exodus: Why Hollywood Is Bolting the Golden State
FBI Search of Ga. Offices Tied to Probe of Possible 2020 Election 'Defects,' Affidavit Says
item.description: The FBI obtained a search warrant to seize hundreds of boxes of ballots from election offices in Fulton County, Georgia, as part of a criminal investi...

item.title: DOJ moves to wipe Steve Bannon's contempt conviction tied to Jan 6 probe
item.description: The Justice Department is seeking to dismiss Steve Bannon's contempt conviction despite his completed four-month prison sentence for defying a Jan. 6 ...

item.title: Trump's reaction to new footage of Guthrie abduction was 'pure disgust,' Leavitt says
item.description: FBI released shocking footage of a masked, armed person at Nancy Guthrie's home on the day she vanished, prompting President Donald Trump to react wit...

item.title: House hearing raises red flags over former tech mogul's âCCP networkâ allegedly funding far-left groups
item.description: A House committee exposed how foreign adversaries allegedly fund U.S. protest groups through extensive "dark money" networks, targeting a Shanghai exe...

item.title: Another One Bites the Dust: Tech Mogul Latest to Flee Newsom's Golden State for Greener Pastures
Murkowski's Folly: Opposing SAVE Act Undermines Election Security
Congress moves to set national rules for self-driving cars, overriding states
item.description: Lawmakers push autonomous vehicle legislation through a House committee to compete with China and establish U.S. as a global leader in self-driving te...

item.title: Watch: Democrat Congresswoman Charged With Assaulting ICE Agents Goes Insane During Hearing
Los Angeles Mayor Targets ICE Access to City Sites
item.description: Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass announced a series of policy proposals Tuesday that would restrict federal immigration officers from using or staying at ...

item.title: House GOP Probes Michigan Noncitizens in Jury Pool, Voter Roll
item.description: House Republicans opened a federal inquiry Tuesday into reports that noncitizens appeared in a Michigan jury pool and, in some cases, were registered ...

item.title: Trump Now Eyeing Sending Second Carrier to Middle East to Cow Iran
GOP Fundraising Lead Over Dems Widens Ahead of Midterms
item.description: Democrats are warning that a financial advantage they enjoyed for much of the Trump era is fading, with FEC filings showing Republicans and allied out...

item.title: Democratic congresswoman sparks online outrage over 'deranged' question to ICE director about 'going to hell'
item.description: Rep. LaMonica McIver's controversial questioning of ICE acting director Todd Lyons about "Judgment Day" and hell sparks viral social media backlash.

item.title: Telecom Execs Defend Turning Over Lawmakers' Data to Biden DOJ
item.description: Executives from major cellphone providers told a Senate panel they complied with legal demands when turning over lawmakers' call records connected to ...
